1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/a-i-ks/ioBroker.volumio/blob/master/io-package.json).

3014.issue: [S3014] "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3020.issue: [E3020] "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3050.issue: [W3050] "test-and-release.yml": could not retrieve log for "check-and-lint" job in [run #121](https://github.com/a-i-ks/ioBroker.volumio/actions/runs/20642721429).

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (src/lib/restVolumioClient.ts, src/main.ts). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/lib/websocketVolumioClient.ts, test-client.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "os" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:os" instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (test-client.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/a-i-ks/ioBroker.volumio/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/subscribeToStateChanges" attribute "label" uses key "Subscribe to player state changes (deprecated)" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8909.issue: [W8909] Dependabot entry for "npm" uses "schedule: interval: monthly" with a "day" setting. The "day" setting is not supported for monthly schedules and should be removed.

8911.issue: [S8911] File "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" was found. Consider migrating to the new standard workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml".

8912.issue: [E8912] Automerge workflow file "/.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge.yml" uses deprecated action "ahmadnassri/action-dependabot-auto-merge" which no longer works. Please migrate to "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@v1".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0082.issue: [S0082] A newer version (5.0.6) for package "@types/express" (devDependencies) exists. The newer version has been published for more than 200 days. Please evaluate if upgrading from 5.0.0 to 5.0.6 is possible.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">= 20" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/a-i-ks/ioBroker.volumio/blob/master/package.json).

0034.issue: [W0034] @iobroker/adapter-core 3.3.2 specified. 3.4.1 (or newer) is current. Please update dependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/a-i-ks/ioBroker.volumio/blob/master/package.json)
